title: DamageTracker For MythicMobs
body:
DamageTracker is a powerful and highly customizable plugin that tracks and displays player damage against MythicMobs bosses. Perfect for RPG servers, this plugin enhances player engagement by creating competitive boss battles with detailed damage statistics and customizable victory messages.

## Features
**Comprehensive Damage Tracking**

- Real-time tracking of player damage against MythicMobs bosses.
- Support for all damage types including melee, ranged, and indirect damage (TNT, pets, area effects).
- Accurate percentage-based damage contribution calculations.
- Persistent tracking throughout the entire boss fight.

**Customizable Messages**

- Fully customizable victory messages using MiniMessage or legacy color codes.
- Support for gradients, rainbows, and advanced color formatting.
- Personalized damage contribution messages for each participant.
- Configurable display format for top damage dealers.
- Centered text support for aesthetic announcements.

**Configuration**

- Individual boss configurations.
- Customizable number of top players to display.
- Configurable damage and percentage formats.
- Default fallback configuration for undefined bosses.
- Support for both MiniMessage and legacy color codes.

**Integration Support**

- Full MythicMobs integration.
- PlaceholderAPI support for flexible message customization.
- Optional Vault integration for prefix/suffix support.

## Installation
1. Place the plugin JAR in your server's plugins folder
2. Install required dependencies (MythicMobs and PlaceholderAPI)
3. Start/restart your server
4. Configure the plugin in the config.yml file
- Optional: Install Vault for extended functionality

## Support & Contributing
You can find the documentation [HERE](https://elplatano0871.gitbook.io/elplatano0871-plugins)

Source code can be found [HERE](https://github.com/PabloCastanedaMartinez/DamageTracker-For-MythicMobs)
